requirements.task_name: Buy 4 tickets for the Haunted Maze on October 29 using the cheapest evening timeslot and promo code
requirements.task_description: Purchase exactly 4 tickets for the 'Haunted Maze' attraction on October 29, selecting the cheapest available timeslot that starts after 6:00 PM, and apply the promo code 'BRAIN10' before proceeding to checkout.

required_variables.set_condition: Whenever getCheckoutSummary is called (i.e., when the checkout page is loaded), regardless of cart contents.
required_variables.reason: Cart and promo data allow verification of correct tickets, date, time, quantity, cheapest-evening constraint, and promo code usage, but they do not indicate that the user clicked 'Proceed to checkout'. This flag records that the checkout summary was actually viewed for this session.

requirements.task_name: Create a 3-item zombie apparel bundle under $25 each with high ratings and venue pickup
requirements.task_description: Build a custom bundle of exactly 3 zombie-themed apparel items, each priced at $25 or less and rated 4 stars or higher, add them to the cart, and set delivery to 'Pick up at event venue'.

requirements.task_name: Book group tickets for 8 friends across two different attractions on Halloween night after 8 PM
requirements.task_description: For October 31, add 4 tickets to the Haunted Maze after 8:00 PM and 4 tickets to the Zombie Escape Room after 9:00 PM, so that the group experiences two different attractions in one night, then view both in the cart.

required_variables.set_condition: Whenever getCartSummary is called (i.e., the cart page is loaded), regardless of contents.
required_variables.reason: Cart contents and timeslots are enough to verify that the correct two attractions, quantities, date, and time constraints are met. This flag is only needed to confirm that the user actually opened the cart page to view those items, as required by the task.

requirements.task_name: Plan a 3-event evening schedule on October 30 between 5 PM and 10 PM
requirements.task_description: Use the event calendar to select three different events on October 30 that occur between 5:00 PM and 10:00 PM, add each of them to 'My Night Plan', and then open the plan page.

required_variables.set_condition: Whenever getNightPlan is called (i.e., when the 'My Night Plan' page is opened).
required_variables.reason: Night plan contents are fully evaluable from existing data, but the task explicitly requires opening the plan page. This flag is needed to confirm that the user actually viewed the plan after adding the three qualifying events.

requirements.task_name: Save 5 kid-friendly low-scare attractions to your favorites
requirements.task_description: Find attractions that are tagged as kid-friendly with scare levels 1–3 and age ratings of 'All ages' or '10+', save the first five results to your favorites, and open the favorites list.

required_variables.set_condition: Whenever getFavoritesList is called (i.e., when the favorites page is loaded).
required_variables.reason: Existing data is sufficient to validate that the correct set of kid-friendly, low-scare attractions has been saved. This flag is required only to confirm that the user actually opened the favorites list as specified in the task.

requirements.task_name: Reserve a VIP Zombie Escape Room session for 2 players before 7 PM on November 1 with a photo package add-on
requirements.task_description: Book a VIP version of the Zombie Escape Room for 2 players on November 1, choosing the earliest available timeslot before 7:00 PM, and add the 'Photo & Video Package' before going to checkout.

required_variables.set_condition: Whenever getCheckoutSummary is called (i.e., when the checkout page is loaded), regardless of contents.
required_variables.reason: Ticket, timeslot, and add-on selections can already be validated from existing storage. This flag is only needed to confirm that the user actually proceeded to the checkout step after configuring the VIP session with the photo package.

requirements.task_name: Add a parking pass within 500 m of the Quarantine Zone Arena for October 31 at 7 PM
requirements.task_description: Using the interactive map, find a parking area within 500 meters of the 'Quarantine Zone Arena', select the first matching option, and add a parking pass for October 31 at 7:00 PM to the cart.

requirements.task_name: Register for a free Zombie Makeup Workshop for a group of 3 on an afternoon between October 28–30
requirements.task_description: Find a free, family-friendly 'Zombie Makeup Workshop' scheduled between 1:00 PM and 4:00 PM on any date from October 28 to October 30, and complete a registration form for 3 attendees using the given contact details.
